name: Tinymist Typst Preview
desktopOnly: siyuan-tinymist only works on the desktop client (tinymist child process requires Node integration).

setting.title: Tinymist Settings
setting.tinymistPathDesc: Path to the tinymist binary. Leave as 'tinymist' to use PATH.
setting.previewPortDesc: Data-plane bind address. Use 127.0.0.1:0 for a random port.
setting.materializeModeDesc: How a SiYuan doc becomes main.typ. code-blocks: extract ```typst blocks; markdown: light md→typst conversion.
setting.extraArgsDesc: Space-separated extra args passed to `tinymist preview` (e.g. --invert-colors=auto).

errors.notFound: tinymist not found. Install it (cargo install tinymist or GitHub releases) and set the path in settings.
errors.portInUse: Port already in use. Set Preview server host:port to 127.0.0.1:0 (random) in settings, or free the port.
errors.noTypstContent: No ```typst code blocks found. Add one or switch Materialize mode to markdown.
errors.compileError: Typst compiled with errors. Check the preview tab and your Typst source.
errors.timeout: tinymist preview did not start in time. Check the tinymist path and console logs.
errors.exited: tinymist exited unexpectedly. See console ([tinymist] logs) for details.
